channel.title: Home on Hri7ik H4cks
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Hri7ik H4cks

item.title: CPTS Bulletproof Methodology
item.description: A comprehensive, decision-tree based methodology covering 100% of the CPTS exam. Covers external recon, web app attacks, service exploitation, privilege escalation, Active Directory attacks, pivoting, and more.

item.title: Master Pivoting with Ligolo-ng: From Single Hops to Deep Network Tunnels
item.description: Forget proxychains. Master single and double pivoting with Ligolo-ng — the modern TUN-based tunneling tool every red teamer should know.

item.title: About
item.description: Cybersecurity professional specializing in penetration testing and CTF walkthroughs
